award.description: 360 Radiance has been recognized as the **Best Skin Care Clinic in Sunrise, Florida** by BusinessRate, powered by Google Reviews. This award reflects the trust, satisfaction, and real results our clients experience every day.
award.footer: Powered by Google Reviews · BusinessRate Verified

about.p1: Marta Nazzar is a licensed Paramedical Aesthetician with a B.S. in Biology and A.S. in Medical & Laboratory Studies from Florida College of Natural Health. Her 25+ years of medical background allow her to merge clinical precision with aesthetic artistry.
about.p2: Certified under renowned acne expert Dr. James E. Fulton through the Face Reality program, Marta evaluates diverse skin types to determine the best solution for each individual. She created the Radiance Skin Care Line — botanical formulas free of toxins, parabens, and sulfates.
about.pageSubtitle: 25+ years of medical expertise, a deep passion for skincare science, and a commitment to results that change lives.
about.bioHeading: From Medical Science to Skincare Artistry
about.p3: Certified under renowned acne expert Dr. James E. Fulton through the Face Reality program, Marta evaluates diverse skin types to determine the best solution for each individual. Dr. Fulton pioneered Retin-A — and his clinical protocol is the foundation of Marta's acne treatment approach.
about.p4: She created the Radiance Skin Care Line — a proprietary collection of botanical formulas free of toxins, parabens, and sulfates. Every product blends clinical science with nature's most beneficial ingredients, designed for real skin conditions and real results.
about.p5: Fluent in English and Spanish, Marta ensures every client feels understood and confident in their treatment plan. Her practice isn't just about clearing skin — it's about restoring confidence and changing lives.

scienceFirst.title: Science-First Approach
scienceFirst.desc: Every recommendation is backed by clinical research and 25+ years of medical experience. No trends, no guesswork — just proven results.

personalized.title: Personalized Care
personalized.desc: No two skin types are the same. Every client receives a custom treatment roadmap and take-home protocol designed for their unique needs.

cleanIngredients.title: Clean Ingredients
cleanIngredients.desc: The Radiance line is toxin-free, paraben-free, and sulfate-free. We believe effective skincare should never compromise your health.

longTerm.title: Long-Term Health
longTerm.desc: We treat the root cause, not just symptoms. Our goal is lasting skin health and the confidence that comes with it.

treatmentPaired.title: Treatment-Paired

ingredient.title: Ingredient-First
ingredient.desc: We select actives based on clinical research — not trends. European-sourced, glass ampule-sealed, and concentrated for maximum efficacy.

products.ingredientHeading: Why Ingredients Matter More Than Brands

ingredient.p1: The skincare industry spends billions on packaging and marketing. We spend ours on ingredients. Every formula in the Radiance Collection starts with a single question: what does the clinical data say?
ingredient.p2: Our European glass ampule serums contain 4-10x higher concentrations of active ingredients than their retail counterparts. Single-use packaging eliminates oxidation — meaning every drop is as potent as the day it was formulated.
ingredient.p3: We publish every key ingredient and its clinical benefit because we believe informed clients make better skincare decisions. No proprietary blends hiding behind fancy names — just transparent, evidence-based formulas.
